rules.rule_text:
rule shad0w_LdrLoadDll_hook
{
	meta:
		description = "Shad0w beacon LdrLoadDll hook"
		author = "SBousseaden"
		reference = "https://github.com/bats3c/shad0w"
		date = "2020-06-06"

	strings:
		$s1 = "LdrLoadD"
		$s2 = "SetPr"
		$s3 = "Policy"
		$s4 = {B8 49 BB DE AD C0}

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and all of ( $s* )
}
